creator: roger.marsh@btinternet.com
text:
Created attachment 195179
Build log for spidermonkey52

synth just-build lang/spidermonkey52 fails

but

cd /usr/ports/lang/spidermonkey52
make build

works.

Attachment is not first failure because I assumed that was a 'watchdog timeout' (1 of 2 failures in ~600 ports) and just repeated the job expecting the failures to succeed.  Error repeated when spidermonkey52 was done as first package, using commands above, on second machine after 11.1 to 11.2 upgrade to see what happened.  I set synth to fetch the pre-built package to avoid problem.
